name: graphql
description: A reference example for a GraphQL API with Apollo Server and Prisma in TypeScript.

scripts.dev: pnpm -s run start:db && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ts-node-dev src/main.ts
scripts.start: pnpm -s run start:db && cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsx src/main.ts
scripts.generate: pnpm -s run generate:graphql && pnpm -s run generate:prisma
scripts.migrate: pnpm -s run start:db && npx prisma migrate dev

author: wolfnfox
